task_description: Complete rebrand of the fashion portfolio site from 'Happiness Fashion' to 'Happiness Fashion World'. Replace all imagery with authentic Nigerian/African models in Nigerian attire, redesign logo, add fashion-related icons throughout, elevate design to international luxury standard, add new sections (Craftsmanship process, Booking CTA), and enhance overall visual polish.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (tsc -b) passes with zero errors. Vite production build succeeds with reasonable bundle sizes. No test framework to run. All 4 features implemented and verified.
